task_description: UI audit: remove dead code (App.legacy.vue, orphaned tests, unused utility files), consolidate duplicated code (useFreshData, formatDate) into the shared library, and document unused-but-available shared components.

verification.summary: Admin build passes (vue-tsc --noEmit + vite build). Portal build passes (vue-tsc --noEmit + vite build). Admin tests: 7 passed (useCommandPalette). Shared tests: 12 passed (useFreshData 6 tests + useFormValidation 6 tests). All type-checking clean with zero errors.
